ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League to which the team belongs */,
  "league_rank" INTEGER /* Current league ranking of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "punt_returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each punt return entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player for whom the stats are recorded */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the game in which the punt return occurred */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the opponent in the game */,
  "return_type" TEXT /* Type of return (punt return, kickoff return, etc.) */,
  "returns" INTEGER /* Total number of punt returns */,
  "fair_catches" INTEGER /* Total number of fair catches */,
  "yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained from punt returns */,
  "average" REAL /* Average yards gained per return */,
  "longest" INTEGER /* Longest return in yards */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total touchdowns scored from returns */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_punt_returns_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_punt_returns_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_stats ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_punt_returns_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_totals" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the team */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season for which the team totals are calculated */,
  "returns" INTEGER /* Total number of punt returns by the team */,
  "fair_catches" INTEGER /* Total number of fair catches made by the team */,
  "yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained from punt returns by the team */,
  "average" REAL /* Average yards gained per return by the team */,
  "longest" INTEGER /* Longest return in yards by the team */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total touchdowns scored from returns by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "season")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponent_totals" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the opponent's punt return statistics */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the team playing against the opponent */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season for which the opponent totals are calculated */,
  "returns" INTEGER /* Total number of punt returns by the opponent */,
  "fair_catches" INTEGER /* Total number of fair catches made by the opponent */,
  "yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained from punt returns by the opponent */,
  "average" REAL /* Average yards gained per return by the opponent */,
  "longest" INTEGER /* Longest return in yards by the opponent */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total touchdowns scored from returns by the opponent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id", "team_id", "season")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the team the coach is associated with */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the coach */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "fire_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was fired (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the team playing in the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the opposing team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the game took place */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (regular season, playoff, etc.) */,
  "game_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (win, loss, tie, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
